title: gethealthendpointreturns200whenservicerunning
description: Verify that GET /health returns HTTP 200 OK when the sidecar service is running and reachable, indicating liveness.

title: postv1sessionscreatesnewsession
description: Verify that POST /v1/sessions with an empty body creates a new chat session and returns 200 with a new session_id.

title: postv1sessionsessionidagentrunstartsagentrun
description: Verify that POST /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent/run with a prompt and mode="agent" starts an agent run and returns 200, and that subsequent GET /v1/sessions/{session_id}/agent/events returns the expected SSE events.

title: getv1providersreturnsconfiguredproviders
description: Verify that GET /v1/providers returns HTTP 200 with the list of configured model providers.

title: postv1providersdiscovermodelsreturnsmodelsforprovider
description: Verify that POST /v1/providers/discover-models with a valid provider returns HTTP 200 with available models for that provider.

title: getv1commandsreturnsavailablecommands
description: Verify that GET /v1/commands returns HTTP 200 with the list of available slash commands.

title: postv1toolsessionidtoolnameinvokeinvokestool
description: Verify that POST /v1/tools/{session_id}/{tool_name}/invoke with valid input invokes the tool and returns HTTP 200 with the tool result.

title: getv1settingsreturnscurrentsettings
description: Verify that GET /v1/settings returns HTTP 200 with the current runtime-mutable settings.

title: postv1terminalopensessionandreturnsid
description: Verify that POST /v1/terminal opens a new terminal session and returns HTTP 200 with a terminal_id.
